title: get_global_realtime_stats_success
description: Verify that GET /api/v1/stats returns a 200 status with a success status, total_analysis as a number, and top_domain as a string.

title: get_global_realtime_stats_database_timeout
description: Verify that GET /api/v1/stats returns a 503 status with an error status and appropriate database timeout message when the database times out.

title: get_3d_visualization_trend_success
description: Verify that GET /api/v1/domains/trend returns a 200 status with success status, months as an array of date strings, categories as an array of strings, and data as a 2D number array.

title: get_3d_visualization_trend_query_timeout
description: Verify that GET /api/v1/domains/trend returns a 504 status with an error status and query timeout message when the request is too large or times out.

title: post_n_depth_category_analysis_with_path_success
description: Verify that POST /api/v1/category_node with a valid category path returns a 200 status with the correct path, is_leaf boolean, trend_series object, and products array.

title: post_n_depth_category_analysis_with_keyword_success
description: Verify that POST /api/v1/category_node with a valid keyword returns a 200 status with the resolved path, is_leaf boolean, trend_series object, and products array.

title: post_n_depth_category_analysis_empty_body_error
description: Verify that POST /api/v1/category_node with an empty body returns a 400 status with an error status and message indicating that path or keyword is required.

title: post_n_depth_category_analysis_large_result_set_error
description: Verify that POST /api/v1/category_node returns a 504 status with an error status and message indicating the result set is too large and suggesting pagination or narrower path.

title: get_popular_keywords_success
description: Verify that GET /api/v1/popular_keywords with valid domain and window parameters returns a 200 status with success status and an items array containing keyword objects with keyword, score, domain, and timeframe fields.

title: get_popular_keywords_exceed_batch_limit_error
description: Verify that GET /api/v1/popular_keywords with more than 3 keywords returns a 400 status with an error status and message indicating the Naver batch limit exceeded.
